strategic_objective: Assess the stability and shortcut potential of the dominant destination port distribution in DDoS traffic.
key_checks: Measure class-conditioned distribution stability of Destination Port across time segments
Evaluate entropy and dominant port ratio variability within DDoS class
Test shortcut-like predictive leverage of Destination Port feature alone
Compare port distribution patterns between attack campaigns and benign traffic
success_criteria: Evidence of stable dominance of a single port in DDoS class across samples
Identification of potential shortcut exploitation via port-based heuristics
Detection of representation-sensitive shifts in port distribution under different conditions
